title: AI Agent Credential Crisis: Six Months of Incidents
abstract: Are you ever frustrated when your AI agent suddenly quits on you? This past six months with "AI Agent Credential Crisis" has been a wild ride of both laughter and headache. From technical glitches to credential crises, these incidents have kept us on our toes! Join us as we explore the funny and frustrating events that shaped this year.
abstract_zh: 你是不是也遇到过AI代理突然辞职不干了？这半年来，AI Agent Credential Crisis简直是“哭笑不得”。从技术故障到权限危机，各种突发状况轮番上演！快来了解那些让人捧腹又头疼的事件吧！
